required_sources: existing ST/list table or equivalent symbol-status classification
limit-band reference or derived market-board/ST rule set
likely_root_causes: canonical suspension event table was never populated from raw status feed
limit-price coverage is low because previous close, raw limit fields, or board/ST-specific limit rules are missing or not canonicalized
raw suspension and limit-price data may exist in the same local DuckDB but was not transformed into the snapshot readiness tables
local_db_checks: List all tables in the DuckDB file backing the snapshot in read-only mode
Search for columns such as is_suspended, trade_status, halt_code, suspend_type, up_limit, down_limit, pre_close, board, and ST/list status
Compare candidate raw-table coverage against the snapshot symbol-date matrix
Quantify which missing fields cause WARNING_EVENT_TABLE_EMPTY and WARNING_LOW_COVERAGE
Draft canonicalization SQL only after confirming local raw coverage

next_db_ops_task.title: Diagnose missing suspension events and low limit-price coverage for A-share L1 snapshot
steps: canonicalization SQL draft if local data exists
network-ingest specification only if local data is absent

non_authorization: This plan does not grant product-read, live-trading-data, Phase 3 evidence, micro recommendation, recommendation, ticket, broker, order, paper, live, DB-write, network-ingest, raw-data-migration, or secret-handling readiness.
